annotation: Glossary term: امہات (Ummahat) — The Mothers (primary elements/spheres)
rationale: Curated glossary entry: The Mothers — the primary elements/celestial spheres from which the sublunar 'children' (muwallidat) are generated.

original_excerpt: اللہ تعالی نے مختلف آیتوں میں فرمایا کہ اس ک
annotation: Glossary term: اللہ (Allah) — Allah / God
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Allah — the proper name of God.

original_excerpt: ) | ارض (زمین) | ⏎ | --- | --- | ⏎ | ناطق | اساس | ⏎ | حد عالی | حد دانی |
annotation: Glossary term: اساس (Asas) — Foundation (Imam after the Natiq)
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Asas — Foundation; in Ismaili cyclical doctrine, an alternative title for the Wasi (Legatee) of a Natiq.
